subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest toward Truth! Render thanks unto God that thou hast fixed thy gaze upon Truth and hast turned toward the omnipotent Lord. Thou art a ray from the Sun's brilliance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حق نظر شکر کن خدا را که نظر بحق داری و توجه بغنی مطلق پرتوی از شعاع شمس
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @thankfulness; gratitude
